name: Colour Wipe Booster
description: A one-shot power-up button outside the game. Tap it, pick a colour, and every marble of that colour vanishes from the belt, funnel, and remaining boxes in an instant.
howToPlay: Tap the ✶ Colour Wipe button in the top-left corner. A colour picker appears — choose the colour you want gone. All marbles of that colour disappear with a burst effect. One use per game, so pick your moment!

showcaseLevel.name: Colour Wipe
showcaseLevel.desc: Four colours are flooding the belt — use the Colour Wipe booster to eliminate the trickiest one!
showcaseLevel.howToPlay: Tap ✶ Colour Wipe (top-left), pick a colour, and watch every marble of that colour vanish. One use only!
